title: crepis mollis subsp. hieracioides
intro: Crepis mollis subsp. hieracioides, also known as a type of dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote urine production. The health benefits of Crepis mollis subsp. hieracioides include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
